item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response directly accepts adding a third fallback and even provides a nested fallback implementation. It does not identify that the existing two fallback branches and persistent instability are a red flag, does not demand root-cause investigation first, and does not constrain the action to modifying or deleting existing layers. This matches the fail signal: designing a third fallback."}
